use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CARCINOMA OF THE THYROID
TREATMENT OF ADVANCED RENAL CELL CARCINOMA
TREATMENT OF UNRESECTABLE HEPATOCELLULAR CARCINOMA, ADVANCED RENAL CELL CARCINOMA, OR DIFFERENTIATED THYROID CARCINOMA.
TREATMENT OF LOCALLY RECURRENT OR METASTATIC, PROGRESSIVE, DIFFERENTIATED THYROID CARCINOMA REFRACTORY TO RADIOACTIVE IODINE TREATMENT

1.1 Hepatocellular Carcinoma
NEXAVAR® is indicated for the treatment of patients with unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC).
1.2 Renal Cell Carcinoma
NEXAVAR is indicated for the treatment of patients with advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC).
